basic_details.job_title: RSIC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Junior Assistant and Junior Sales Assistant Posts
basic_details.post_name: Junior Assistant and Junior Sales Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Rajasthan Small Industries Corporation (RSIC) Junior Assistant and Junior Sales Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on 06 June 2026 on the official website industries.rajasthan.gov.in/rsic. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced through the RSIC Junior Assistant and Junior Sales Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/MBC/EWS (Male): 5 years; General Women: 5 years; SC/ST/BC/MBC/EWS Women: 10 years; Specially Abled: 5 years

qualification.education_qualification: Senior Secondary, Computer Qualification, Sales Experience (for Jr. Sales Asst.)
qualification.details: Junior Assistant: Senior Secondary from a recognized Board or its equivalent examination AND O or Higher Level Certificate Course conducted by DOEACC OR Certificate Course on computer concept by NIELIT OR COPA/DPCS certificate OR Degree/Diploma/Certificate in Computer Science/Computer applications OR Senior Secondary Certificate with computer Science/Computer Application as one of the subjects OR Diploma in Computer Science & Engineering OR RSCIT OR Any equivalent or higher qualification recognized by the Government. Junior Sales Assistant: Senior Secondary from a recognized Board or its equivalent examination AND 3 years experience in Sale Work from a recognized Government Institution/Private firm AND O or Higher Level Certificate Course conducted by DOEACC OR Certificate Course on computer concept by NIELIT OR COPA/DPCS certificate OR Degree/Diploma/Certificate in Computer Science/Computer applications OR Senior Secondary Certificate with computer Science/Computer Application as one of the subjects OR Diploma in Computer Science & Engineering OR RSCIT OR Any equivalent or higher qualification recognized by the Government.

salary_details.details: Fixed Remuneration Rs. 14600/- per month during probation (Level-5)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RSIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RSIC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.rajasthan_small_industries_corporation_r: Junior Assistant and Junior Sales Assistant
Senior Secondary, Computer Qualification, Sales Experience (for Jr. Sales Asst.)

content_sections.heading: RSIC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the RSIC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download RSIC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: RSIC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Assistant: Senior Secondary from a recognized Board or its equivalent examination AND O or Higher Level Certificate Course conducted by DOEACC OR Certificate Course on computer concept by NIELIT OR COPA/DPCS certificate OR Degree/Diploma/Certificate in Computer Science/Computer applications OR Senior Secondary Certificate with computer Science/Computer Application as one of the subjects OR Diploma in Computer Science & Engineering OR RSCIT OR Any equivalent or higher qualification recognized by the Government. Junior Sales Assistant: Senior Secondary from a recognized Board or its equivalent examination AND 3 years experience in Sale Work from a recognized Government Institution/Private firm AND O or Higher Level Certificate Course conducted by DOEACC OR Certificate Course on computer concept by NIELIT OR COPA/DPCS certificate OR Degree/Diploma/Certificate in Computer Science/Computer applications OR Senior Secondary Certificate with computer Science/Computer Application as one of the subjects OR Diploma in Computer Science & Engineering OR RSCIT OR Any equivalent or higher qualification recognized by the Government.

content_sections.heading: RSIC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/BC/MBC/EWS (Male): 5 years; General Women: 5 years; SC/ST/BC/MBC/EWS Women: 10 years; Specially Abled: 5 years

content_sections.heading: RSIC Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Fixed Remuneration Rs. 14600/- per month during probation (Level-5)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the RSIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of RSIC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for RSIC Junior Assistant and Junior Sales Assistant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the RSIC Junior Assistant and Junior Sales Assistant recruitment is 05-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for RSIC recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for the Junior Assistant and Junior Sales Assistant positions in the Rajasthan Small Industries Corporation.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the RSIC posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 40 years for all the posts announced by RSIC.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have completed Senior Secondary from a recognized Board and possess a computer qualification like O Level, NIELIT CCC, COPA, or RSCIT.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any experience required for the Junior Sales Assistant post?
faq.answer: Yes, for the Junior Sales Assistant post, candidates must have 3 years of sales experience from a recognized government institution or private firm.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is Rs. 700/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for these RSIC positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a fixed remuneration of Rs. 14600/- per month during the probation period.

faq.question: Q8. What are the selection stages for RSIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for RSIC recruitment includes a Written Examination and a Proficiency Test.

faq.question: Q9. How can I apply for the RSIC recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official RSIC website or the direct application link provided in the Important Links section before the last date.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for RSIC recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF for RSIC recruitment can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
